lectures.text:
Concept Alpha is a foundational idea.
Formula Alpha formalizes Concept Alpha: F_alpha(x) = x.
Method Beta requires Concept Alpha.
Formula Alpha is applied in Method Beta, and Method Beta requires Formula Alpha.
Concept Alpha Alias denotes the same educational object as Concept Alpha.
The relation between Concept Alpha Alias and Method Beta admits two readings in this synthetic fixture.
Concept Gamma is an isolated concept.
